esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
// Tablespace metrics are dimensioned by attributes.tablespace_name
| WHERE oracledb.tablespace_size.usage IS NOT NULL
        AND oracledb.tablespace_size.limit IS NOT NULL
| STATS usage = MAX(oracledb.tablespace_size.usage),
        limit_val = MAX(oracledb.tablespace_size.limit)
        BY oracledb.instance.name, host.name, attributes.tablespace_name
// Exclude unlimited tablespaces (limit -1)
| WHERE limit_val > 0
// Utilisation threshold: 90% — critical for SYSTEM/SYSAUX; write failures at full
// Adjust threshold per environment (e.g. 85 for stricter monitoring)
| EVAL utilisation_pct = ROUND(usage * 100.0 / limit_val, 1)
| WHERE utilisation_pct > 90
| SORT utilisation_pct DESC
